raw_consumer_statement: HELLO MY NAME IS XXXX XXXX I AM MAKING THIS COMPLAINT BECAUSE I PREVIOUSLY CALLED BARCLAY BANK TO REPORT THE THEFT OF THE CREDIT CARD OF MY AUTHORIZED USER [ XXXX XXXX ] WHERE MULTIPLE FRAUDULENT TRANSACTIONS WERE MADE TO MY ACCOUNT, BUT THE BANK HAS NOT YET OPENED THE CLAIM FOR THE FRAUDULENT TRANSACTIONS THAT I HAVE ALREADY CALLED 2 TIMES TO MAKE THE SAME REPORT
